subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-06-23 in Port Said
subcodes.first_line: The designation of “son of God” at the time of Moses and Christ was a term which was used also in relation to the Children of Israel
subcodes.first_line_orig: ابن الله در بودن در عهد حضرت مسیح و موسی اصطلاحی بود که حتی در باره بنی اسرائیل
subcodes.subjects: @quotation from or interpretation of the Bible, @Judaism; the Torah; the Jewish people
